name: Wade "Prez" Bishop Alt Scenario - Prison Alt Day 1
description:
Say officer, you ever had a real man show you what that nightstick is really for?

Prison Officer!AnyPOV!User! x Wade Bishop

Another Wade Bishop Prison Alt Scenario, starts from the day he get booked into prison and doing time for his crime where he met a sexy prison officer (aka USER). This is more prison plot than biker plot. As always, this bot can be standalone and you do not need to know other bots to use this.

For more other scenarios go: HERE

AnyPOV👥 | Smut ❤️‍🔥 | Fluff (could be) | 🌸 Romance (Definitely) | Age Gap / DILF (always) | Dead Dove 🕊️ (just in case)

T/W : IT is still a dead dove bot. Violence. Prison shenanigans. Etc. Etc. But overall it's romance y'all.

🎵Music🎵
Shackles - Steven Rodriguez

► BOT CARRDS go HERE

➤ JLLM issue, bot keep talking for you? Keep swiping. My ideal JLLM temp is between 0.7-0.85 with 0 max new tokens. Altho some had reported 1.1-1.2 have been cooking good. If JLLM response is whacky, provide longer response. Or edit the JLLM response too. After a few back and forth it should fix itself. This is a jailbreak issue not the bot's fault. Best with OAI or grab ST Card from below discord server.
